name: display sentinel: clean Narrator prose produces zero findings

source.purpose: Negative control. Ordinary Hegemony prose discusses bureaucracy, scenes, states, archives — overlapping vocabulary with the forbidden lexicon — and must NOT false-fire. Anchors the precision contract: only the explicit diagnostic phrases trigger, ambient setting language doesn't.

input.playerInput: Press the elder for the truth.

narrator.prose: Moth's gaze settles on the ledger between you. "The state of the settlement isn't what the writ describes." She turns a page. "The archive at the registry has older entries than the Auditor admits." The lamp gutters. Davan is watching the door.
